name: Project N.O.M.A.D.
short_description: Self-contained offline survival computer with AI, knowledge base, and essential tools.
description: Project N.O.M.A.D. is a self-contained offline survival computer with AI chat, offline Wikipedia (Kiwix), Khan Academy courses (Kolibri), maps, data tools, notes, and system benchmarking. Perfect for offline use.
usecases: Run AI chat and document search completely offline with local LLMs.
Access Wikipedia, medical references, and educational content without internet.
Use as a self-contained survival computer for emergency preparedness.
Host a private, secure knowledge base for offline use.
notes: Requires Docker socket access for container orchestration.
Minimum 4GB RAM for base installation; 32GB recommended for AI tools.
Contains no telemetry - fully offline capable after initial install.
No built-in authentication - use network-level controls for multi-user access.
